arts.ttl: 'The finish of a poacher' | Jackson gets Chelsea's early opener in off the post
arts.sum: Marc Cucurella crosses the ball over to Nicolas Jackson who cooly guides the shot in off the near post.

arts.ttl: Sky Sports PUNDITS are forced to provide commentary for Chelsea vs Aston Villa clash from Anfield - after Stamford Bridge audio cuts out
arts.sum: A major technical hitch at Stamford Bridge led to the audio cutting out, scrambling host David Jones into an impromptu segment live on air.

arts.ttl: BREAKING: Sky Sports apologise for Chelsea vs Aston Villa issues as David Jones immediately blunders
arts.sum: Chelsea vs Aston Villa was the first match of a Premier League double-header on Sky Sports, ahead of Liverpool vs Manchester City, but there were early issues with the broadcast

arts.ttl: Former Chelsea boss Graham Potter opens up on mental health struggles and feeling of 'imposter syndrome' as he says there is a stigma around male managers who are expected to be 'alpha males'
arts.sum: Graham Potter said he has experienced feelings of inadequacy throughout his 30 year career. The 49 year old also said there is a 'stigma' around male football coaches

arts.ttl: Manchester United v Everton, Chelsea v Aston Villa and more: Premier League – live
arts.sum: Updates from 1.30pm GMT kick-offs across the grounds Live scoreboard | And send Luke a mail Here we go. Maresca has made 10 changes from the midweek win at Heidenheim. Jadon Sancho is the player to keep his place in the lineup. Continue reading...

arts.ttl: Chelsea and Manchester United face transfer competition for striker as clause revealed
arts.sum: Juventus have set their sights on reported Chelsea and Manchester United target Liam Delap as a potential successor to Dusan Vlahovic. Chelsea and United are also keeping tabs on Delap's development, while City have a buy-back clause and negotiated a 20% sell-on when they sold the forward to Ipswich for £20million in July.

arts.ttl: Levi Colwill claims rivals should be 'scared' to face Chelsea
arts.sum: Chelsea centre-back Levi Colwill boldly claimed that his side are "battering most teams" while lauding the impact of manager Enzo Maresca.

arts.ttl: Aston Villa team news vs Chelsea confirmed as Unai Emery makes two changes
arts.sum: Villa starting XI: Martinez, Cash, Konsa, Pau, Digne, Kamara, Tielemans, Philogene, McGinn, Rogers, Watkins. Opponents Chelsea were winless in all eight league matches last season against the teams that finished in the top four - and they've only taken one point from three meetings with those sides in 2024-25.

arts.ttl: Chelsea v Aston Villa line-ups: Three Blues changes, two for Villa
arts.sum: Chelsea v Aston Villa. The post Chelsea v Aston Villa line-ups: Three Blues changes, two for Villa appeared first on West London Sport.

arts.ttl: Chelsea team news: Enzo Maresca names unorthodox formation for Aston Villa game
arts.sum: Enzo Maresca seemingly names an unorthodox Chelsea XI for Sunday's Premier League fixture versus Aston Villa.
